meaning: and the ones who scatter (feminine plural)
a heavy load (object being carried by الحاملات)
and by the ones (feminine) that flow smoothly
and the female ones who divide
a command/matter/affair (object of فَٱلْمُقَسِّمٰتِ - those who distribute)
you (all) are promised/warned (what is mentioned in this surah)
indeed truthful (predicate of إِنَّ describing what you are promised)
and indeed (emphasizes that ٱلدِّينَ is true)
and by the sky/heaven (which is described by ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ - 'having pathways')
possessor of (describing السَّمَاء, owned by الْحُبُكِ)
away from him (object of يُؤْفَكُ - is turned away)
he was turned away (subject of يُؤْفَكُ)
he was killed (subject of this statement is ٱلْخَرَّاصُونَ - the liars)
the ones who constantly make baseless guesses (subject of قُتِلَ - 'cursed be')
in a state of being overwhelmed (describes حال of الَّذِينَ)
they ask (about أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ - when is the Day of Judgment)
on the day when (they will be tested)
they are being tested (on the Fire)
taste/experience! (command to a group) (referring to فِتْنَتَكُمْ - your trial)
your trial (referring to the punishment mentioned in ذُوقُوا)
those who are taking (subject of كَانُوا)
they were (describing مُحْسِنِينَ - those who do good)
that (far) (points to what came before in the ayah)
those who do good (object of كَانُوا)
a little (describing how much they slept)
that which (connects to يَهْجَعُونَ - they sleep)
they sleep lightly (describing the righteous people mentioned earlier in the ayah)
and in the dawn times (connected to يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ)
their wealth (in the phrase 'in their wealth')
for the beggar (receiving the due/right mentioned)
and the deprived one (connected to لِلسَّآئِلِ - for the beggar)
and in (preposition showing location in الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
for the ones who are certain
your selves (referring to those being addressed)
then will you not? (subject of تُبْصِرُونَ)
and in (connects to ٱلسَّمَآءِ - the sky/heaven)
your (all of you) provision (in السَّمَآءِ/the sky)
and what (that is promised to you)
indeed it (referring to what was sworn by in فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
he came to you (object of هَلْ - 'has')
upon him (who entered in إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟)
unknown ones, strangers (describing the angels who visited Ibrahim)
so he turned away secretly (connected to فَجَآءَ - then he brought)
so he came (connected to فَرَاغَ - he turned)
with a calf (object of جَاءَ - he came)
and then he brought it close (to إِلَيْهِمْ - to them)
to them (referring to the guests in the story)
he said (introducing what he offered to his guests)
will you not? (asking about تَأْكُلُونَ - eating)
and then he felt (takes خِيفَةً 'fear' as object)
from them (referring to the guests/angels in the story)
a fear (object of أَوْجَسَ - he felt)
they said (to him when he was afraid of them)
and they gave him good news
then she came forward (subject of صَكَّتْ and قَالَتْ)
with a loud cry (describing how امْرَأَتُهُ came)
then she slapped/struck forcefully (subject of وَقَالَتْ)
her face (acted upon by فَصَكَّتْ - she struck)
your Lord (feminine, as the doer of قَالَ - said)
indeed he/it (referring to رَبُّكِ - your Lord)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
so what (asking about خَطْبُكُمْ - your matter)
the messengers (who are being addressed in this ayah)
indeed we (are the ones who were sent)
of a people/tribe (possessed by مُّجْرِمِينَ - criminals)
so that we may send (stones upon them)
upon them (connected to لِنُرْسِلَ - to send)
for those who go beyond limits
in it (referring to the city/town mentioned earlier)
then not (connected to وَجَدْنَا - we found)
and we left (connected to previous ayah)
a sign/miracle (object of تَرَكْنَا - we left)
they fear (those who fear الْعَذَابَ الْأَلِيمَ - the painful punishment)
the punishment (object of يَخَافُونَ - they fear)
the intensely painful (describing ٱلْعَذَابَ - the punishment)
Moses (subject of أَرْسَلْنٰهُ - we sent him)
when (connecting to أَرْسَلْنٰهُ - we sent him)
Pharaoh (object of أَرْسَلْنٰهُ - we sent him)
with authority (connected to أَرْسَلْنٰهُ - we sent him)
and his armies (being acted upon by أَخَذْ)
so we threw them away (after فَأَخَذْنٰهُ)
and in (preposition showing location in عَادٍ)
the wind (object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
she leaves (subject of wind in أَتَتْ)
a thing (that is acted upon by عَلَيْهِ)
she came (subject of wind in تَذَرُ)
she made it (object of تَذَرُ - she leaves)
Thamud (as the object being referred to)
when (referring to قِيلَ - it was said)
and then they rebelled (followed by عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ - against the command of their Lord)
command of (possessed by رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)
and then she seized them (subject of الصَّاعِقَةُ)
they look/observe (while the punishment struck them)
ones who become victorious (predicate of كَانُوا)
Noah's (proper name, being described by قَوْمَ)
they were (referring to قَوْمَ نُوحٍ - the people of Noah)
we built it (referring to السَّمَاء/the heaven)
and indeed we (connected to بَنَيْنٰهَا - we built it)
surely we are ones who expand
the ones who spread out (subject of نِعْمَ - 'how excellent')
We created (referring to Allah using the royal 'We')
so run away! (command to a group)
for/to you all (referring to those who should flee to Allah)
a warner (describing the speaker's role in relation to إِنِّى)
clear, evident (describing something in this ayah)
you (plural) make/set/place (in relation to اللَّهِ - Allah)
with/along with (connects اللَّهِ to previous phrase)
a warner (one who warns others about Allah's punishment)
from (connects قَبْلِهِم to what comes before it)
before them (referring to those who came before)
a madman/one possessed (subject of سَاحِرٌ أَوْ)
so turn yourself away! (command to Prophet ﷺ)
away from them (referring to those being turned away from)
you (subject of فَمَآ...بِمَلُومٍ - 'then you are not blamed')
with/by a blamed one (in the ayah: you are not to be blamed)
for indeed (connects to وَذَكِّرْ - and remind)
the reminder (that helps the believers تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ)
and not (connects to previous statement and negates خَلَقْتُ/I created)
except (limiting the creation of جِنَّ and إِنس to worship)
so that they worship Me (purpose of خَلَقْتُ/I created)
I want (from مَآ أُرِيدُ - I do not want)
from them (referring to the jinn and humans mentioned earlier)
and not (connects to أُرِيدُ - I want)
I want (subject of the verb phrase مَآ أُرِيدُ - I do not want)
indeed/truly (emphasizes that Allah is the Provider)
The Ultimate Provider (a name of Allah)
The All-Strong, The Firm One (a name of Allah)
they were unfair (to others) (subject of يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ)
of the big mistake (belonging to أَصْحٰبِ - companions)
from (connects يَوْمِهِمُ to what came before)
the one who/which/that (refers to يَوْمِهِمُ - their day)
they are being promised/warned (refers to those who disbelieved)
